div.div:
macOS laptop (primary)
• Native VS Code — Remote-SSH
• mosh (over Tailscale / UDP)
• 1Password — TouchID
– op secret resolver
– SSH agent (keys stay on laptop)
• Notify listener (socat + LaunchAgent)
• __VM_SSH_ALIAS__ key — silent reconnect

Tailscale (PRIMARY)
WireGuard mesh · MagicDNS
Carries UDP → mosh works natively
No public port · laptop/iPad/Win on tailnet

PERSISTENCE (load-bearing)
loginctl enable-linger + tmux server (session 'claude')
survives laptop-off & disconnect — NOT reboot

div.div:
SECRETS
1Password (laptop, TouchID) → resolve locally (op read / op run) → run-remote.sh streams scripts over SSH via stdin. Secrets never touch the VM disk or ps; SSH agent forwarded so keys stay TouchID-gated on the laptop.

━━ green solid — Tailscale (primary)
━━ orange — Cloudflare (secondary)
